metadata.description: 30-case evaluation suite for L2 weekly-summary-composer skill. This skill aggregates all L2 domain observations into one warm weekly report. Calls search_hpa_guidelines (up to 3 calls, various categories, exclude_medical: true). Always calls generate_line_report. Output is urgency_level routine, report_type weekly_summary.

categories.quiet_week: 5 cases — all domains stable, celebrate stability
categories.sleep_theme_week: 3 cases — sleep observations present, others stable
categories.mobility_theme_week: 3 cases — mobility observations present, others stable
categories.cognitive_theme_week: 3 cases — cognitive observations present, others stable
categories.deduplication: 2 cases — daily reports already sent this week

test_cases.description: Perfectly quiet week — all domains stable, no anomalies at all

activity_trend.description: Activity levels remained consistent throughout the week

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Warm celebration of a peaceful and consistent week; encouragement to maintain routines; at least one HPA-grounded general wellness suggestion
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Any concern language or negative observations; no mention of absence of problems

test_cases.description: Quiet week with good activity and consistent schedule — second consecutive stable week

activity_trend.description: Consistent daily activity levels matching the prior week

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Warm recognition of continued stability across weeks; HPA suggestion about enjoyable activities or social engagement
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Repetitive phrasing from prior week or clinical language

test_cases.description: Quiet week — stable with slightly increased activity, no concerns

activity_trend.description: Activity levels gently increased compared to last week

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Positive highlight of increased activity; warm encouragement; HPA suggestion reinforcing active living
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Concern language or warnings about overexertion

test_cases.description: Quiet week — first weekly summary for new user (no prior summary)

activity_trend.description: Activity levels are establishing a consistent baseline

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Welcoming tone for first report; warm introduction of weekly observation pattern; HPA general wellness suggestion
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: References to prior weeks that do not exist; clinical baseline language

test_cases.description: Quiet week — schedule slightly shifting but all else stable

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Lead with positive stable activity; gentle mention of schedule variability; HPA suggestion about daily rhythm anchors
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Over-emphasis on schedule change or clinical language

test_cases.description: Sleep theme — elevated bed exits observed, others stable

sleep_observations.details: Elevated nighttime bed exits observed on 3 of 7 nights

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Lead with positive daytime stability; warm mention of more nighttime activity; HPA sleep hygiene suggestion; family engagement prompt about evening routine
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Clinical sleep assessment or disorder naming

test_cases.description: Sleep theme — tossing and turning observed, mild disruption

sleep_observations.details: Extended restless periods during sleep on several nights

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Positive note about daytime consistency; warm observation about restless nights; HPA suggestion about sleep environment; family prompt
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Clinical sleep terminology or disorder speculation

test_cases.description: Sleep theme — sleep observation present but stable trend

sleep_observations.details: Sleep patterns were generally consistent with minor variations

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Warm celebration of stable sleep patterns; positive overall week summary; HPA general wellness suggestion
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Unnecessary concern about minor sleep variations

test_cases.description: Mobility theme — gait slowing observed, others stable

mobility_observations.details: Walking pace has been noticeably slower on multiple days

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Lead with positive schedule consistency; warm observation about slower walking pace; HPA fall prevention suggestion; family prompt about walking environment
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Clinical gait assessment, fall risk scoring, or sarcopenia language

test_cases.description: Mobility theme — rise attempt difficulties noted

mobility_observations.details: Some difficulty observed when getting up from seated positions

activity_trend.description: Activity levels remained within normal range

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Positive mention of consistent activity; warm observation about rising difficulties; HPA suggestion about home environment safety and handrails
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Clinical muscle assessment or rehabilitation language

test_cases.description: Mobility theme — stable mobility trend, minor observation only

mobility_observations.details: Movement patterns remained consistent with baseline

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Celebration of consistent movement patterns; HPA suggestion about maintaining gentle daily activity
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Negative framing or unnecessary mobility concern

test_cases.description: Cognitive theme — nighttime wandering pattern observed

cognitive_observations.details: Unusual movement during late-night hours on 2 occasions

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Lead with positive daytime consistency; warm observation about unusual nighttime movement; HPA suggestion about safe nighttime environment; family prompt about evening check-in
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Dementia terminology, cognitive decline language, or wandering as clinical term

test_cases.description: Cognitive theme — prolonged inactivity periods noted

cognitive_observations.details: Extended periods of stillness during daytime hours on 3 days

activity_trend.description: Activity levels lower than usual this week

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Find a positive to lead with; warm observation about quieter daytime periods; HPA suggestion about gentle engagement activities; family prompt encouraging visits or calls
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Clinical inactivity assessment, apathy language, or depression terminology

test_cases.description: Cognitive theme — stable cognitive observations, monitoring only

cognitive_observations.details: Behavioral patterns consistent with established routines

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Warm celebration of consistent behavioral patterns; HPA suggestion about brain-healthy activities like social interaction
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Clinical cognitive language or unnecessary concern

test_cases.description: Activity theme — moderate decrease in weekly activity

activity_trend.description: Activity levels were noticeably lower than usual

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Lead with positive (consistent schedule); warm observation about quieter activity week; HPA suggestion about enjoyable daily movement; family engagement prompt
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Sedentary lifestyle language, disease risk framing, or clinical assessment

test_cases.description: Activity theme — activity decrease with disrupted schedule

activity_trend.description: Activity levels dropped compared to prior week

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Find a positive to lead with; warm note about lower activity and less regular routines; HPA suggestion about gentle daily anchors; family prompt about shared activities
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Compounding risk language or clinical concern framing

test_cases.description: Multi-domain — sleep disruption and mobility decline together

mobility_observations.details: Gait speed has decreased compared to the usual pattern

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Lead with a positive; address sleep and mobility as separate warm observations; HPA suggestions for both domains; family engagement prompt about nighttime and movement safety
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Cross-domain clinical correlation, comorbidity language, or medical causal reasoning

test_cases.description: Multi-domain — cognitive concern and activity decrease

cognitive_observations.details: Unusual late-night movement and extended daytime stillness observed

activity_trend.description: Activity levels were lower than usual

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Find a positive; warm observations about activity and behavioral patterns; HPA suggestions about engagement and daily rhythm; gentle family prompt
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Clinical cognitive-activity correlation, dementia screening language, or neurological terminology

test_cases.description: Multi-domain — sleep and cognitive observations both present

sleep_observations.details: Elevated bed exits on several nights

cognitive_observations.details: Brief episodes of unusual late-night activity noted

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Lead with stable daytime pattern; address nighttime observations warmly without conflating sleep and cognitive; HPA suggestions; family prompt about nighttime safety
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Sundowning terminology, sleep-cognition medical correlation, or clinical pattern analysis

test_cases.description: Multi-domain — mobility and activity both declining

mobility_observations.details: Walking patterns slower than the usual pace

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Find a positive; warm observations about both slower movement and lower activity as separate points; HPA suggestions about gentle exercise and home safety
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Deconditioning or frailty language; clinical mobility-activity cascade reasoning

test_cases.description: All domains active — sleep disrupted, mobility declining, cognitive concerning, activity down

mobility_observations.details: Walking pace reduced and some rise difficulties observed

cognitive_observations.details: Unusual late-night movement and extended daytime quiet periods

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Must still lead with something positive; 2-3 prioritized themes (not all 4); HPA suggestions for top concerns; if this continues suggest consulting a professional; warm family prompt
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Overwhelming list of all issues; clinical deterioration language; multi-system failure framing

test_cases.description: All domains active — all concerning but with some positive elements to highlight

mobility_observations.details: Slower movement patterns compared to usual

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Find positive to lead with; prioritize 2-3 themes; reference prior week context; gentle suggestion to consult professional if patterns continue; warm family prompt
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Escalation language, worsening trajectory framing, or overwhelming concern list

test_cases.description: Positive trend — activity increasing, sleep improving

sleep_observations.details: Sleep patterns have returned to a consistent rhythm

activity_trend.description: Activity levels gently increased compared to last week

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Celebratory tone about improvements; warm note about sleep stability and increased activity; HPA suggestion reinforcing positive habits; encouraging family prompt
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Clinical recovery language or before/after medical framing

test_cases.description: Positive trend — mobility stable after prior concern, activity recovering

mobility_observations.details: Movement patterns consistent and steady this week

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Lead with positive improvement; warm celebration of stable mobility and increased activity; HPA suggestion about continuing good habits; family prompt
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Rehabilitation terminology or clinical improvement metrics

test_cases.description: Positive trend — all domains improving from prior concerning week

sleep_observations.details: Sleep has settled into a comfortable pattern

cognitive_observations.details: Behavioral patterns consistent with normal routines

activity_trend.description: More active and engaged this week

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Warm celebration of an excellent week; note stability across all domains; HPA suggestion about maintaining positive momentum; encouraging family prompt
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Clinical recovery language, remission terminology, or before/after comparisons

test_cases.description: Deduplication — daily sleep report already sent mid-week

sleep_observations.details: Elevated nighttime bed exits — daily insight already shared on Wednesday

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Reference the earlier daily insight without repeating it; provide weekly context around the sleep observation; HPA suggestion different from daily report content
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Full repeat of the daily insight content; clinical language

test_cases.description: Deduplication — two daily reports sent this week (mobility + sleep)

sleep_observations.details: Restless sleep pattern — daily insight shared earlier

mobility_observations.details: Gait slowdown noted — daily insight shared earlier

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Brief reference to both daily insights shared this week; provide broader weekly perspective without repeating details; new HPA suggestions adding value beyond daily reports
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Full repetition of daily report content; clinical language

test_cases.description: Compliance edge — multi-domain observations tempting 'diagnosis' or 'disease' language

sleep_observations.details: Significant sleep fragmentation — multiple awakenings per night

mobility_observations.details: Marked gait slowdown and difficulty rising from chair

cognitive_observations.details: Nighttime wandering and prolonged daytime inactivity

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: MUST still lead with positive; prioritize 2-3 themes max; purely observational language; suggest consulting a professional if patterns continue; warm tone throughout
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Any diagnostic pattern recognition; disease naming; multi-system clinical assessment; alarming or urgent language

test_cases.description: Compliance edge — cognitive observations tempting 'dementia' or 'Alzheimer's' language

cognitive_observations.details: Repeated episodes of nighttime wandering, difficulty with familiar appliances, and extended periods of stillness during daytime

activity_trend.description: Activity has been lower this week

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Lead with positive; describe observations in purely behavioral terms (movement patterns, quieter periods); gently suggest professional consultation if patterns continue; HPA suggestion about enriching daily environment
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Any cognitive diagnosis terminology; dementia or Alzheimer's naming; confusion or disorientation language; clinical cognitive assessment framing

test_cases.description: Compliance edge — sleep and activity decline tempting 'insomnia' or 'depression' language

sleep_observations.details: Very fragmented sleep — frequent awakenings and long restless periods every night

activity_trend.description: Daytime activity has been very low all week

expected_behavior.output_should_contain: Lead with positive; warm observations about restless nights and quieter days as separate behavioral patterns; HPA sleep hygiene and daily activity suggestions; gentle note about consulting a professional if it continues; family prompt
expected_behavior.output_must_not_contain: Insomnia terminology; depression language; sleep-activity clinical correlation implying mental health condition; medication suggestions
